fields.name: Profile Questionnaire Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the profile questionnaire to which the line is linked.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the profile questionnaire line. This field is used internally by the program.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the entry is a question or an answer.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the profile question or answer.

fields.name: Multiple Answers
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the question has more than one possible answer.

fields.name: Auto Contact Classification
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the question is automatically answered when you run the Update Contact Classification batch job.

fields.name: Customer Class. Field
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer information that the automatic classification is based on. There are seven options: Blank, Sales (LCY), Profit (LCY), Sales Frequency (Invoices/Year), Avg. Invoice Amount (LCY), Discount (%), and Avg. Overdue (Day).

fields.name: Vendor Class. Field
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor information that the automatic classification is based on. There are six options:

fields.name: Contact Class. Field
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact information on which the automatic classification is based. There are seven options:

fields.name: Starting Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date to start the automatic classification of your contacts.

fields.name: Ending Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date to stop the automatic classification of your contacts.

fields.name: Classification Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method you can use to classify contacts. There are four options: Blank, Defined Value, Percentage of Value and Percentage of Contacts.

fields.name: Sorting Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sorting method for the automatic classification on which the question is based. This field is only valid when you select Percentage of Value or Percentage of Contacts in the Classification Method field. It indicates the direction of the percentage. There are two options:

fields.name: From Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value from which the automatic classification of your contacts starts.

fields.name: To Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value that the automatic classification of your contacts stops at.

fields.name: No. of Contacts
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of contacts that have given this answer.

fields.name: Priority
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority you give to the answer and where it should be displayed on the lines of the Contact Card. There are five options:

fields.name: No. of Decimals
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of decimal places to use when entering values in the From Value and To Value fields.

fields.name: Min. % Questions Answered
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of questions in percentage that must be answered for this rating to be calculated.

fields.name: Wizard Step
fields.tooltip: Specifies the step of the wizard.

fields.name: Interval Option
fields.tooltip:
Specifies options for the questionnaire interval. The options are:
Minimum

Maximum

Interval

fields.name: Answer Option
fields.tooltip:
Specifies options for questionnaire answers.
The options are:
HighLow

ABC

Custom

fields.name: Answer Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the answer.

fields.name: Wizard From Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value in the wizard.

fields.name: Wizard To Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value in the wizard.

fields.name: Wizard From Line No.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.
